architecture_decision.rationale: DD disk images cause hardware-specific failures (ESP timeouts, firmware mismatches). nixos-install from flake works on any x86_64 hardware.
key_files: iso/appliance-image.nix (installer ISO with dialog TUI + msp-auto-install)

agent_decision.deprecated: Python compliance-agent (packages/compliance-agent/) — DO NOT USE for new work
agent_decision.rationale: Go daemon is production-ready with full L1/L2/L3 healing, Windows+Linux+macOS scanning, evidence chain, flap detection, learning flywheel, fleet updates, auto-deploy, AD discovery, WoL. 17x less RAM, 6000x faster startup, 73x smaller binary.
